tags_v2.setting: home kitchen marble counter with decor

seconds_v2.desc: On a white marble counter, a foil loaf pan sits inside a clear plastic container holding a shallow amber oil bath in which rows of flat wooden candle wicks lie soaking; a green plastic cup stands behind it and a wooden craft stick rests on the lid's right ledge.

Same static setup: wooden wicks submerged in the dark amber liquid in the foil tray, their pale tips poking out at the left edge; green cup, disco-ball jar and a glittery decorative sign sit behind on the marble surface.
Unchanged overhead-ish view of the foil pan of wood wicks steeping in oil/dye inside the clear tub, wooden stir stick along the right rim, jar of yellow liquid at far right.
The soaking tray of wooden wicks holds steady; amber oil coats the flat wicks, a few light-coloured wick ends visible bottom-left, decor and green cup in the background.
Continued still frame of the wood wicks lying in the amber soaking bath within the foil pan and clear container, craft stick beside them, marble counter and mosaic disco vase behind.
No change: rows of dark oil-soaked wooden wicks in the foil tray, clear plastic outer container, green tumbler and glittery 'star' sign decor in back.
Static shot persists of the wooden wicks immersed in amber liquid, foil pan glinting, wood stir stick on the lid; the maker is talking off-camera about soak timing.
Same arrangement of soaking wood wicks in the oil bath, pale tips at left, surrounded by the green cup, disco-ball jar and decorative sign on the marble top.
Final near-identical frame: foil tray of wooden candle wicks steeping in amber oil inside the clear container, craft stick along the right edge, decor unchanged behind.
